component.name: Nitty
component.summary: A modern, fast, and feature-rich terminal emulator

description.p: Nitty is a terminal emulator built from the ground up for power users, written in the Nitpick programming language. It combines standard local shell capabilities with advanced features like integrated SSH connection management, a built-in encrypted credential vault, SFTP browsing, native serial port and telnet support, and a flexible plugin system.

ul.li: First-class SSH, Serial, and Telnet connection profiles.
Drop-down "Quake Mode" accessible via global hotkey.
Built-in encrypted credential vault for SSH passwords.
Side-by-side and vertical pane splitting via BSP trees.

description.p: Introduced standard Linux packaging formats (.deb, .rpm, AppImage, Flatpak).
Comprehensive developer documentation and architecture guides.
Comprehensive user manual and quick reference cards.
